race.description: Castlereagh Hotel Winter Country Classic Qualifier F&M Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: TIYE (2) ready for this trip third-up and set to peak. Failed to keep up early and came from near last on the turn with a respectable fourth over 1100m at Scone. Strong finish expected again here and must be kept safe. JAMACRI (8) gets a better set-up for this with the claim after disappointing with a battling fourth over 1200m at Cobar. Will sit on the speed and has genuine each-way claims. SWINGING HIGH (3) big drop in grade for this after disappointing in town with a poor last over 1250m at Randwick Kensington in BM72 grade. Can turn it around quickly at this level. JOSEPHINE (6) slow into stride first-up and never got into the contest with a disappointing fourteenth over 1100m at Scone. Extra trip in her favour. Place best.
